items.title: S01E01 - Call It A Lifetime (1)
items.summary: A truck skids into a motorcycle policeman and kills him. The driver who thinks he'll be blamed for the accident, steals a another car and flees.

infolabels.title: Call It A Lifetime (1)
infolabels.plot: A truck skids into a motorcycle policeman and kills him. The driver who thinks he'll be blamed for the accident, steals a another car and flees.

items.title: S01E02 - Isn't It A Lovely View (2)
items.summary: A crippled woman’s reluctance to admit that she witnessed a murder from her apartment window leads Anderson to suspect her husband committed the crime to avoid a blackmail payment.

infolabels.title: Isn't It A Lovely View (2)
infolabels.plot: A crippled woman’s reluctance to admit that she witnessed a murder from her apartment window leads Anderson to suspect her husband committed the crime to avoid a blackmail payment.

items.title: S01E03 - Tears From A Silver Dipper
items.summary: Caught stealing drugs from a military base, PFC George Valdez becomes the chief suspect in a murder — but race prejudice may be influencing the outcome of his court-martial.

infolabels.title: Tears From A Silver Dipper
infolabels.plot: Caught stealing drugs from a military base, PFC George Valdez becomes the chief suspect in a murder — but race prejudice may be influencing the outcome of his court-martial.

items.title: S01E04 - A Shield Is For Hiding Behind
items.summary: Deke Palmer seems like the perfect 19-year-old college student, But Timmy, his 15-year-old brother, knows different. He knows that each time his brother drops him off at the movie theater, he must be able to tell Deke the plot in great detail, so that Deke will have an alibi for whatever he's really off doing while Timmy sits alone at the movies. Can Deke be brought to justice.

infolabels.title: A Shield Is For Hiding Behind
infolabels.plot: Deke Palmer seems like the perfect 19-year-old college student, But Timmy, his 15-year-old brother, knows different. He knows that each time his brother drops him off at the movie theater, he must be able to tell Deke the plot in great detail, so that Deke will have an alibi for whatever he's really off doing while Timmy sits alone at the movies. Can Deke be brought to justice.

items.title: S01E05 - My Name is Martin Burnham
items.summary: A suicidal engineer accidentally kills a co-worker while attempting a leap from a high-rise construction site, and he opts to offer no defense for the crime in the hope of being sent to the gas chamber.

infolabels.title: My Name is Martin Burnham
infolabels.plot: A suicidal engineer accidentally kills a co-worker while attempting a leap from a high-rise construction site, and he opts to offer no defense for the crime in the hope of being sent to the gas chamber.

items.title: S01E06 - A Flame in the Dark
items.summary: Anderson is puzzled by 14-year-old Bobby Randolph, who won't accept the fact that his mother was murdered by a sniper. He also wonders why the boy's business-tycoon father tries to do all the talking. What is the father trying to hide.

infolabels.title: A Flame in the Dark
infolabels.plot: Anderson is puzzled by 14-year-old Bobby Randolph, who won't accept the fact that his mother was murdered by a sniper. He also wonders why the boy's business-tycoon father tries to do all the talking. What is the father trying to hide.

items.title: S01E07 - Whose Little Girl Are You?
items.summary: A master tool and die craftsman, unbalanced by the loss of his physical dexterity, kills the verbally abusive co-worker who is about to take over his job.

infolabels.title: Whose Little Girl Are You?
infolabels.plot: A master tool and die craftsman, unbalanced by the loss of his physical dexterity, kills the verbally abusive co-worker who is about to take over his job.

items.title: S01E08 - The Witnesses
items.summary: A schoolteacher’s conscience bothers her when the wrong man is arrested for murder — but since she was with a married man when she witnessed the crime, she cannot come forward without ruining her reputation.

infolabels.title: The Witnesses
infolabels.plot: A schoolteacher’s conscience bothers her when the wrong man is arrested for murder — but since she was with a married man when she witnessed the crime, she cannot come forward without ruining her reputation.

items.title: S01E09 - Inquest Into A Bleeding Heart
items.summary: After a little girl is run down by a reckess motorcyclist, a discredited doctor performs emergency surgery — only to find himself on trial for practicing without a license after the girl dies.

infolabels.title: Inquest Into A Bleeding Heart
infolabels.plot: After a little girl is run down by a reckess motorcyclist, a discredited doctor performs emergency surgery — only to find himself on trial for practicing without a license after the girl dies.

items.title: S01E10 - The Quality of Justice
items.summary: Anderson is searching for a child-killer, unaware that the killer is mentally retarded and very unstable.

infolabels.title: The Quality of Justice
infolabels.plot: Anderson is searching for a child-killer, unaware that the killer is mentally retarded and very unstable.

items.title: S01E11 - We May Be Better Strangers
items.summary: A young hoodlum beats two men nearly to death and also engages in some unusual acts of vandalism. Egan agrees to defend the boy on the charges, but he soon begins to wonder about the boy's strange obsession with a prominent Superior court judge.

infolabels.title: We May Be Better Strangers
infolabels.plot: A young hoodlum beats two men nearly to death and also engages in some unusual acts of vandalism. Egan agrees to defend the boy on the charges, but he soon begins to wonder about the boy's strange obsession with a prominent Superior court judge.

items.title: S01E13 - Some Weeks Are All Mondays
items.summary: Anderson realizes that the daughter of a well-known playwright may have murdered her stepfather.

infolabels.title: Some Weeks Are All Mondays

items.title: S01E14 - Run, Little Man, Run
items.summary: Fred Stukey's wife is found dead at a church bazaar, and Anderson discovers that a known thief named Antsy Jackson was on the scene. Can the piece the puzzle together.

infolabels.title: Run, Little Man, Run
infolabels.plot: Fred Stukey's wife is found dead at a church bazaar, and Anderson discovers that a known thief named Antsy Jackson was on the scene. Can the piece the puzzle together.

items.title: S01E15 - Funny Man With A Monkey
items.summary: A night club comic is suspected of killing a doctor to get narcotics to fed his hunger and addiction.

infolabels.title: Funny Man With A Monkey

items.title: S01E17 - Onward and Upward
items.summary: A sleazy corporate yes-man inherits the unpleasant task of corpse disposal after his boss murders his mistress.

items.title: S01E18 - An Echo of Conscience
items.summary: Anderson has a hard time accepting that his old friend, a private detective who was thrown off the police force because of his alcoholism, has been driven to murder.

infolabels.title: An Echo of Conscience
infolabels.plot: Anderson has a hard time accepting that his old friend, a private detective who was thrown off the police force because of his alcoholism, has been driven to murder.

items.title: S01E19 - Somewhat Lower Than the Angels
items.summary: A priest’s faith in the innocence of the woman arrested for killing his sister convinces Egan to take the case.

infolabels.title: Somewhat Lower Than the Angels

items.title: S01E20 - People In Glass Houses
items.summary: Two criminals blast their way out of a courthouse.

infolabels.title: People In Glass Houses
infolabels.plot: Two criminals blast their way out of a courthouse.

items.title: S01E21 - The Best There Is (1)
items.summary: Egan is too busy to handle the defense of a young Mexican wrongly accused of murder, so he hands the case off to his aging mentor — but the latter’s senility may obstruct the defendant’s chance at a fair trial.

infolabels.title: The Best There Is (1)
infolabels.plot: Egan is too busy to handle the defense of a young Mexican wrongly accused of murder, so he hands the case off to his aging mentor — but the latter’s senility may obstruct the defendant’s chance at a fair trial.

items.title: S01E22 - A Roll of the Dice (2)
items.summary: An ambitious young hustler, falling victim to his gambling addiction, embezzles a large sum from his employer and goes on a spree in Las Vegas.

infolabels.title: A Roll of the Dice (2)
infolabels.plot: An ambitious young hustler, falling victim to his gambling addiction, embezzles a large sum from his employer and goes on a spree in Las Vegas.

items.title: S01E23 - The Black Flower
items.summary: Back home on parole, Rick Tobin accuses his wife of being friendly with the man he feels is responsible for his conviction and temper start to flare.

infolabels.title: The Black Flower
infolabels.plot: Back home on parole, Rick Tobin accuses his wife of being friendly with the man he feels is responsible for his conviction and temper start to flare.

items.title: S01E24 - A Circle of Strangers
items.summary: Alex and Helen want to marry despite their feuding Hungarian-born families’ objections, but when shy Alex accidentally kills a man their love becomes as star-crossed as Romeo and Juliet’s.

infolabels.title: A Circle of Strangers
infolabels.plot: Alex and Helen want to marry despite their feuding Hungarian-born families’ objections, but when shy Alex accidentally kills a man their love becomes as star-crossed as Romeo and Juliet’s.

items.title: S01E25 - Modus Operandi
items.summary: Lois Janeway insists that her parolee husband has gone straight, but Anderson has a hard time believing that another criminal has adopted Janeway’s highly unusual method of robbery — the use of a vicious trained dog to frighten witnesses during the holdup..

infolabels.title: Modus Operandi
infolabels.plot: Lois Janeway insists that her parolee husband has gone straight, but Anderson has a hard time believing that another criminal has adopted Janeway’s highly unusual method of robbery — the use of a vicious trained dog to frighten witnesses during the holdup..

items.title: S01E26 - Tigers Are For Jungles
items.summary: A hit man decides to retire when he falls in love, but the machinations of his ambitious young accomplice force him to pick up his gun again.

infolabels.title: Tigers Are For Jungles
infolabels.plot: A hit man decides to retire when he falls in love, but the machinations of his ambitious young accomplice force him to pick up his gun again.

items.title: S01E27 - The Revenge of the Worm
items.summary: Anderson advises a truck driver to be practical and pay the “protection” money that a racketeer is extorting from him, but the man’s pride compels him to respond with violence instead.

infolabels.title: The Revenge of the Worm
infolabels.plot: Anderson advises a truck driver to be practical and pay the “protection” money that a racketeer is extorting from him, but the man’s pride compels him to respond with violence instead.

items.title: S01E28 - He Ran For His Life
items.summary: Egan investigates the ex-wife of an unstable man arrested for kidnapping his own son and holding the police at bay with a gun.

infolabels.title: He Ran For His Life
infolabels.plot: Egan investigates the ex-wife of an unstable man arrested for kidnapping his own son and holding the police at bay with a gun.

items.title: S01E29 - Those Whose Love Has Made (1)
items.summary: Two of law professor Marcus Cain’s students hire a man to murder their teacher, but Cain turns the tables and kills the killer — only he can’t confess and claim self-defense, because he was leaving his mistress’ apartment at the time.

infolabels.title: Those Whose Love Has Made (1)
infolabels.plot: Two of law professor Marcus Cain’s students hire a man to murder their teacher, but Cain turns the tables and kills the killer — only he can’t confess and claim self-defense, because he was leaving his mistress’ apartment at the time.

items.title: S01E30 - Birds of a Feather (2)
items.summary: A society girl helps to swindle a mob-connected Texas businessman on a shady land deal, but when Anderson arrests her she refuses to lead him to the sleazy gigolo who put her up to the con.

infolabels.title: Birds of a Feather (2)
